reviews.review_title: Can't create account or log in
reviews.review_description: Total waste of time.  Can't create an account that works, just like the rest of the reviews.  Even after going online and creating an account (good luck finding that) it still doesn't work and then your account password also quits working.

Former Rift S user, was hesitant to try my workflow untethered on mq2. Runs brilliantly with or without PC link. Link lets me broadcast my collab prospect sessions on MS Teams for non vr participants. Issue tracking, robust tools. Absolute workhorse. Autodesk bought another gem. Free guest access using join codes makes running BIM calls with distributed teams a dream.
Can't log in with my account information
Can't make or log in with my Gmail just fix it 🙄

reviews.review_title: irisVR Prospect pathetic sign up process
reviews.review_description:
its full of hassel to signup for the trail of the Application. Portal doesn’t generate email to inbox. I tried multiple email accounts. Re signup says email aready regiatered.😢
Signup for Quest account is second step. 😢
Why always company email is required for trail.😢FB is much less professional than personal email ID and using that is mandatory for Quest 2.😢😢
It doesn't let you sign in and can't make a platform idk what's wrong Just fix it 😮‍💨
